title: UK universities face financial pressure
summary: Several British universities are struggling with rising costs and fewer international students.
toeicQuestion: What problem are some UK universities facing?
discussion: Should higher education be mostly funded by students or by the state?

title: Canada invests in clean energy
summary: Canada is increasing investment in renewable energy projects to reduce carbon emissions.
toeicQuestion: Why is Canada investing in clean energy?
discussion: Can clean energy create enough jobs to replace fossil fuels?

title: Australian cities prepare for extreme heat
summary: Cities in Australia are adapting public spaces to protect people during hotter summers.
toeicQuestion: What are Australian cities preparing for?
answer: They are preparing for extreme heat.
discussion: How should cities adapt to climate change?
